deals.title: 8449 Coughran Rd
deals.notes: Estate sale cash transaction $152,000. Closed and funded April 27, 2026. Lien resolved via Fernando Castillo signature April 21.
deals.next: Post-close follow-ups: joy gift delivery, thank Sam VanDenheuvel, thank you basket for Michael notary and UPS Store staff

logs.m: Transaction officially closed and funded
Fernando Castillo signed lien release at mobile notary, delivered to Chicago Title
Spoke with Fabian Cerrillo regarding lien holder Fernando Castillo

deals.title: Steve Jimenez - Tilden 20ac
deals.notes: 20-acre hunting property. Price adjusted to $117,500. First offer from Michael Rodriguez stalled (no earnest money). Property clearing complete. Lead with net after close on next offer.
deals.next: Follow up with Steve as clearing wraps. When next offer comes in, lead with net after close.

logs.m: Steve signed amendment, MLS updated to $117,500. Agent outreach in progress.
Clearing complete. Photos posted to social. First offer dead - Michael Rodriguez/RBFCU stalled.
Current offer basically dead. Steve clearing property. More open to overall picture on offers.

deals.title: 181 CR 7751
deals.notes: Bank-owned property needs work before listing. Cleanup in progress - floor demo complete, drywall cut. Utility applications being submitted (Medina Electric, EMCSUD). Listing agreement still needed to Jerry Sadler and Ray Stidham.
deals.next: Get transformer number on-site, submit Medina Electric application. Confirm water service with EMCSUD callback. Send listing paperwork to Priority Bank.

logs.m: Cleanup active - floor demo complete, drywall cut. Utility providers confirmed. Email sent to Kelly with utility info.
On-site visit complete. Work actively moving. Dumpsters running since Saturday.
Work officially starting. San Antonio Remodelers dropping dumpsters.

deals.title: 340 Sollock Dr
deals.notes: Residential listing underwater by $93K-$143K. Payoff ~$493K, market value $350K-$400K. Sellers double-carrying ($5,300-6,000/month). Three paths identified: short sale, VA assumption, or bring cash to close. Needs immediate path decision.
deals.next: Broker call first, then call sellers with three options. Confirm which path has appetite.

logs.m: Where Things Stand email sent. Option 3 highlighted at $518,999.
Visited property. Lawn care referral received. Awaiting showing agent feedback.
Express Offers returned $550K. Off given CMA $350K-$400K.

deals.title: 10023 Mill Path
deals.notes: 3BR/2.5BA home listed May 14 at $259,900. Motivated seller relocating to NC, must leave mid-June. First showing feedback received - cultural concern about direction, roof insurance claim in progress.
deals.next: Monitor for second showing or offer. Roof/fascia decision pending with insurance adjuster. Some furniture negotiable.

logs.m: MLS live. First showing feedback received from MK. Canvassed neighborhood.
Insurance adjuster out May 11. New roof incoming.
Listing agreement signed. Photos received from ATG. Live May 13.

deals.title: 00 Borregas
deals.notes: Land/acreage with development potential. Sisters wanted to end March listing. Isaac Linares interested in mobile home development (~$150K offer if project moves). Title defect confirmed - attorney Van Hutchins preparing correction deed.
deals.next: Confirm sisters decision on listing extension. Connect Isaac with Josh LT as potential development partner. Pull prospect call list for continued outreach.

logs.m: Isaac expanding concept to 10-acre lots with mobile homes. Josh LT potential partner.
Title defect confirmed - Deed #20100079485 has incomplete legal description. Attorney Van Hutchins preparing correction deed.
Updated sisters on showing. Discussed Isaac development angle. Sisters enthusiastic.

deals.title: Moran - New Construction
deals.notes: New construction buyer. Budget $50K down, target ~$1,000/month payment. Buyer rep signed May 7. Not locked to Grace Gardens. Builder rate buydowns are the angle.
deals.next: Confirm pre-approval with Zach Schaphorst. Identify new construction builders with no HOA. Schedule model home visits.

logs.m: Need to follow up with Milagros on timeline and interest level through Brandon
MI Homes option found keeping payments under $1,200/mo. New construction search platform sent.
Buyer rep agreement signed via Skyslope

deals.title: 8527 Green Bliss - Rental
deals.notes: Rental listing Grace Gardens Lennar home. Owner renting 2 years then occupying. Jimbo confirmed all terms May 14 - $1,595/month, 12-month lease, full month co-op. Listing agreement must go out today.
deals.next: Finalize listing agreement in Skyslope and send for signatures. Order vinyl signs (Home for Rent and branded).

logs.m: Jimbo confirmed all 12 questions. Ready to send final listing agreement.
Intro email sent to Jimbo with CMA analysis and pricing recommendation.
Spoke with Jimbo on road to Devine. Son made flyers. Ready to move forward.

deals.title: Mike & Alice Howell
deals.notes: Buyer couple, rental being sold, need to move fast. Pivoting to new construction with rate buydowns. No HOA firm requirement. Pre-approval needed with Zach Schaphorst.
deals.next: Confirm pre-approval status with Zach. Set up new construction search. Identify builders with no HOA.

logs.m: Sent showingnew.com search platform. Rental property being sold, rents going up.
916 Marriott assessed - foundation issues, roof from 2011. Introduced new construction idea.

deals.title: 3504 Painted Riv
deals.notes: Investor deal analysis for property analysis template building. Off-market flip. Purchase $199,000, rehab $65,000, ARV $340,000. CMA shows value ~$266,000.
deals.next: Pull MLS comps and RPR report. Feed to Sirhc for template analysis sheet. Lock template for future deals.

logs.m: Investor sent deal via link. Used as basis for property analysis tool.

deals.title: Colton & Abigail Brown
deals.notes: 3BR/2BA, 1,809 sqft, 4.05 acres. Divorce situation, need to sell. Payoff ~$257K (as of Feb 2026). Market value $275K-$315K. Thin market - 3 comps in 10 miles.
deals.next: Get updated payoff letter from lender. Confirm acreage and renovation status on-site. Get listing agreement signed.

logs.m: Met at property. Payoff confirmed $255,578 as of Feb 17. CMA pulled. Net sheet built.
Prior clients. Going through divorce. Colton looking for contractor work.

leads.title: Sallie Mae F.
leads.detail: Community connection through Little Red House garden share. Grief to healing through plants story. Content collaboration opportunity pending permission.
leads.next: Follow up personally. Ask permission to share story on social media.

leads.title: Isaac (Investor)
leads.detail: Met in person. Investor with unknown buy box. Full intake still needed. Likely Schertz area interest.
leads.next: Full intake call - understand buy box, budget, timeline, strategy.

leads.title: Christina Shine
leads.detail: Met at garden event May 9. Has property at 13810 Tangle Tree St she plans to sell soon. Already working with realtor. Property ~90% complete, open to selling as-is.
leads.next: Follow up on finishing work progress. Offer to promote listing to buyer network.

leads.title: Miss Pat Neighbor - Son
leads.detail: Miss Pat mentioned neighbor behind her may have passed. Son now owns house. Deceased was avid gardener. Son not yet contacted.
leads.next: Get contact info from Miss Pat. Reach out to son - introduce as neighbor first, realtor second.

leads.title: Bryce (VA Buyer)
leads.detail: Met on-site at 181 CR 7751 May 11. Dumpster contractor. Wife is active military, VA loan eligible. Recently moved from Ohio, currently renting. Looking to purchase in San Antonio area.
leads.next: Get contact info from Bryce. Qualify wife VA eligibility. Send VA Buyers Guide.

leads.title: Jerome Gardner
leads.detail: Downline agent Schertz/Cibolo area. Has buyer interested in fixer property. Unique situation details pending.
leads.next: Follow up with Jerome - get full buyer and property details.

leads.title: Brandon Moran
leads.detail: Long-standing relationship. Helped get started in real estate. Uncle has rental at Green Bliss. Mom (Milagros) wanting new construction buyer. Two opportunities: rental listing and buyer commission.
leads.next: Rental listing agreement finalize for uncle. Confirm mom pre-approval and new construction search.

leads.title: Kurt - Neighbor
leads.detail: Neighbor around corner from 9815 Conbes. Curious about nearby listing under contract at $275,000. Wants intel on offers.
leads.next: Pull CMA for Kurts area. Follow up with listing agent on 9815 Conbes details.
